title: Past issues: Canada Communicable Diseases Report (CCDR) - Canada.ca
content:
CCDR Advanced search
- Information for authors
CCDR issues are available from 1975 to present.
- Volume 52-5, May 2026: Threat Assessment in Public Health
- Volume 52-4, April 2026: Language & the Web: Tools for Communication, Education & Health Equity
- Volume 52-3, March 2026: Vaccine Safety: Uptake and Hesitancy
- Volume 52-1/2, January/February 2026: Tick and Mosquito Surveillance in Canada

## Past volumes and issues
Volumes 1–29 from 1975–2009 are available in the Government of Canada Publications .
